subject: fix(theme): deep audit fixes — light mode, purity, validation, docs
body:
Comprehensive quality pass from full code audit per CLAUDE.md standards.

Critical fix:
- useTheme.ts: Remove side effects from setState updater in toggleMode.
  Use ref to track isDark, call applyTheme/persistTheme outside updater.
  Prevents double-execution in React Strict Mode.

Light mode fixes (5 files):
- home.tsx, DesktopLayout.tsx, InstallInstructionsModal.tsx: Replace
  hardcoded #0A0A0A with colors.primaryContent on primary buttons
- ChatBackground.tsx: Use theme-aware gradient colors (withAlpha on
  primary/accent/neutralContent) instead of hardcoded rose gold rgba.
  Native bg now uses colors.base100 inline instead of THEME_HEX.luxury.
- bubbleStyles.ts: Convert from module-level StyleSheet to
  createBubbleStyles(colors) function for theme awareness
- BubbleContent.tsx: getStatusColor now accepts colors param, returns
  colors.primaryContent instead of hardcoded #FFFFFF

Validation & error handling:
- themeColors.ts: withAlpha validates hex format and clamps opacity 0-1
- generate-theme-colors.mjs: try/catch on daisyui import with readable
  error, warn on unparseable oklch colors with context

Documentation & compliance:
- tutorial.ts: Add "Dark & light theme in Settings" to What's Different
  step (CLAUDE.md CRITICAL requirement)
- global.css: Clarify why light/dark variants duplicate fantasy/luxury
- PWADebugBanner.tsx: Add TODO comment for hardcoded hex migration
- TODO.md: Track PWADebugBanner migration and status color verification
- useTheme.ts: Document AsyncStorage key format assumption for cross-tab

Tags: theme, bugfix, light-mode, code-quality, validation, tutorial
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
